embeds.title: I couldn’t make drawing a habit… So I tried the opposite
embeds.description:
I have a bad habit of starting things… and never finishing them.
So I wanna try and finishing a 460p Chinese anatomy book in one go to see what would happen.

📖 The Book: 动漫人体结构表现技法专项训练
(Unofficial english translation: "Anime Figure Drawing: Anatomy Training")

The Authors:
tenten云画画
🌐 ArtStation: h
